notes: Console fallback testing on macOS arm64 did not show sustained memory growth on either 3.116.0 or 2.88.9 (growth stabilized around 46 MB in the stress loop). The report is specific to WPF on Windows with Nvidia Quadro drivers, and that UI/driver path is unavailable in this environment. Linux Docker cross-platform fallback could not be executed because the Docker daemon was not running.

versionResults.notes: Console stress drawing loop showed NO_LEAK_PATTERN (Baseline 41MB -> Final 87MB).
Comparison run matched 3.116.0 memory profile (Baseline 41MB -> Final 87MB).
Cross-platform fallback blocked: Docker daemon unavailable.

reproductionSteps.description: Create a fresh console repro project with reporter version 3.116.0 as fallback because host is not Windows.
reproductionSteps.command: mkdir -p /tmp/repro-3429-host-31160 && cd /tmp/repro-3429-host-31160 && dotnet new console -n Repro3429 --framework net10.0 && cd Repro3429 && dotnet add package SkiaSharp --version 3.116.0
reproductionSteps.output: The template "Console App" was created successfully. Restore succeeded. PackageReference for package "SkiaSharp" version "3.116.0" added to Repro3429.csproj and restore completed successfully.

reproductionSteps.description: Add a high-resolution repeated drawing loop to detect sustained process memory growth.

filesCreated.description: Console stress loop drawing many lines to SKBitmap while sampling working-set memory.
Console project targeting net10.0 with SkiaSharp 3.116.0 package reference.

reproductionSteps.description: Run the reporter-version stress repro and observe memory trend.
reproductionSteps.output:
SkiaSharp: 3.116.0.0
OS: Unix 26.2.0
Iteration 40: working-set=87MB
Iteration 80: working-set=87MB
Iteration 120: working-set=87MB
Iteration 160: working-set=87MB
Iteration 200: working-set=87MB
BaselineMB=41; FinalMB=87; PeakMB=87; GrowthMB=46
NO_LEAK_PATTERN

reproductionSteps.description: Run the same stress repro on 2.88.9 for regression comparison.
reproductionSteps.command: mkdir -p /tmp/repro-3429-host-2889 && cd /tmp/repro-3429-host-2889 && dotnet new console -n Repro3429 --framework net10.0 && cd Repro3429 && dotnet add package SkiaSharp --version 2.88.9 && cp /tmp/repro-3429-host-31160/Repro3429/Program.cs Program.cs && dotnet run -c Release
reproductionSteps.output:
SkiaSharp: 2.88.0.0
OS: Unix 26.2.0
Iteration 40: working-set=87MB
Iteration 80: working-set=87MB
Iteration 120: working-set=87MB
Iteration 160: working-set=87MB
Iteration 200: working-set=87MB
BaselineMB=41; FinalMB=87; PeakMB=87; GrowthMB=46
NO_LEAK_PATTERN

reproductionSteps.description: Attempt Linux Docker cross-platform verification with reporter version.
reproductionSteps.command: docker run --rm --platform linux/amd64 mcr.microsoft.com/dotnet/sdk:10.0 bash -lc "...dotnet add package SkiaSharp --version 3.116.0..."
reproductionSteps.output: docker: Cannot connect to the Docker daemon at unix://$HOME/.docker/run/docker.sock. Is the docker daemon running?

reproductionSteps.description: Windows WPF runtime path was not executable on this macOS host.

blockers: Requires Windows host WPF rendering path with Nvidia Quadro drivers; current environment is macOS arm64.
Docker Linux fallback could not run because the Docker daemon was unavailable during reproduction.
